metadata.summary: Atomic 8-schema updates, jq terminal for performance, checksums

definition.core_duty: Citizens must update all 8 schemas atomically after every task. Failure violates sovereignty
definition.requirements: Atomic transaction, JSON schema validation, ≤10KB, checksum, git commit, timestamp

powers.ias_field_officers: Monitor real-time, validate against .aegiside/schemas/*.schema.json, enforce atomic transaction, verify checksums, report violations
powers.chief_justice: HALT if invalid, order rollback, enforce compliance, mandate remediation
powers.shadow_cabinet: Audit quality, challenge incomplete updates, verify RL scores, review graph integrity

post_task_update: 2. Detect completion (git status, validation passed, RL assigned)
3. BEGIN ATOMIC TRANSACTION (all succeed or rollback)
4. jq update activeContext.json (task status, MCP rewards, timestamp)
6. jq update kanban.json (move in_progress→done, awaits Opposition + CJ approval)
7. IF errors: jq prepend mistakes.json (pattern, prevention, RL penalty)
8. IF success: jq prepend systemPatterns.json (pattern, RL reward)
9. jq update progress.json (RL transaction, totals, checksum)
11. Update memory.json via jq (entities/relations, RL reuse)
12. IF all 8 succeed → COMMIT | ELSE → ROLLBACK
13. Validate in parallel (jq reads, size checks)
implementation.validation_rules: Valid JSON, schema_version, timestamp <1min, ≤10KB, required fields. Specific: progress checksum match, memory unique IDs, kanban valid references

violations.remediation: 25 perfect updates, 100% validation pass, demonstrate atomic understanding, IAS certification, Chief Justice approval
